productDisplayName: Timex Expedition Men Black Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch, circular case with fixed bezel and markings, has stainless steel backDial style: Black dial, has white, steel toned and orange markings, steel toned hour and minute hands with orange accents, steel toned seconds hand, steel toned indicator hand with yellow accents, two altimeter subdials, branding near the 8 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset time, date display at the 3 hour mark, three push buttons for altimeter, Indiglo night-lightStrap style: Steel toned, bracelet style strap, has a butterfly claspWater resistant up to 100 mWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
